name: Trail Blazers Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened.
2. Add ground round to the pan and brown, breaking it up with a spatula as it cooks.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour with 1/4 cup of water to form a paste. Gradually add this mixture to the pan with the meat, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Stir in the remaining spices (chili powder, cayenne, oregano, cumin, and salt) and stir well.
5. Pour in the stewed tomatoes and 1 cup of water. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook for at least 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
6. If using beans, add them during the last 10 minutes of cooking.
7. If oil floats to the surface after cooking, slowly stir in more flour until the oil dissipates.
8. Adjust seasoning with additional chili powder if desired before serving.
